title: oxalis dreyerae
intro: Oxalis dreyerae, also known as the Mexican sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Oxalis dreyerae include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and support the immune system. Oxalis dreyerae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used as a food ingredient for its tangy flavor and nutritional value.
